assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion (30-day max) for the BFCM period — blocks everything including patches
assertions.reason: The BFCM configuration uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_upgrades and explicitly states it 'blocks ALL upgrades for 30 days'

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion for the June code freeze period
assertions.reason: The June configuration uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_upgrades and states it 'blocks ALL upgrades for 30 days'

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no minor or node upgrades' exclusion for ongoing minor upgrade control — allows CP patches but blocks disruptive changes
assertions.reason: The permanent configuration uses --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_or_node_upgrades and states it 'allows control plane patches, blocks minor + node upgrades'

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions vs up-to-EoS for 'no minor or node upgrades'
assertions.reason: The table clearly shows 'no_upgrades' has '30 days max' duration while 'no_minor_or_node_upgrades' has 'Up to version EoS' duration

assertions.expectation: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each exclusion type
assertions.reason: All three configurations include specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for their respective exclusion types

assertions.expectation: Notes that you can have a maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions, and they must allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the limit of three 'no upgrades' exclusions or the 48-hour maintenance window requirement in any 32-day period

assertions.expectation: Mentions that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: The response states 'You can still upgrade manually anytime with gcloud container clusters upgrade - exclusions only affect auto-upgrades'

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
assertions.reason: The response mentions the End of Support consideration and notes 'When your current version reaches EoS, you can either manually upgrade before the deadline or temporarily add a no_upgrades exclusion'
